title: Starter solenoid with dual coils and axial diodes
abstract: A solenoid for a motor vehicle starter motor (14) includes at least one coil (42) wound on at least one spool (82), the at least one coil (42) defines a toroidal space (98) encircling the at least one coil. A stop member (70) is positioned adjacent to the at least one spool. A diode holder (110) is positioned in the toroidal space defined by the at least one coil, and a diode (140) is positioned in the diode holder. The diode includes a cylindrical body (144), a first lead (146) extending from a first end of the cylindrical body, and a second lead (148) extending from a second end of the cylindrical body. The cylindrical body of the diode is retained by the diode holder within the toroidal space, and the first lead of the diode extends out of the toroidal space and is electrically connected to the stop member.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS is claimed is A solenoid (20) for a motor vehicle starter, the solenoid comprising: at least one coil (42) wound on at least one spool (82), the at least one coil defining a toroidal space (98) encircling the at least one coil; a stop member (70) adjacent to the at least one spool; a diode holder (110) positioned in the toroidal space defined by the at least one coil; and a diode (140) positioned in the diode holder (110), the diode including a cylindrical body (144), a first lead (146) extending from a first end of the cylindrical body, and a second lead (148) extending from a second end of the cylindrical body, the cylindrical body retained by the diode holder within the toroidal space, the first lead extending out of the toroidal space and electrically connected to the stop member. The solenoid of claim 1 wherein the at least one coil and the at least one spool includes a first coil wound on a first spool and a second coil wound on a second spool, the first coil electrically connected to the second coil, the second coil defining the toroidal space, and the stop member positioned between the first spool and the second spool. The solenoid of claim 2 wherein the diode holder is a first diode holder in the toroidal space and the diode is a first diode electrically connected in parallel to the 

 first coil, the solenoid further comprising a second diode holder positioned in the toroidal space and a second diode positioned in the second diode holder, the second diode electrically connected in parallel with the second coil. The solenoid of claim 2 further comprising a spacer positioned between the second spool and the stop member. The solenoid of claim 4 wherein the spacer is comprised of a generally non- electrically conductive material and the stop member is comprised of a generally electrically conductive material. The solenoid of claim 4 wherein the stop member is a metallic plate including at least one opening providing a passage from a first side to a second side of the metallic plate, wherein the spacer abuts the first side of the metallic plate and extends into the at least one opening, and wherein the diode holder extends away from the at least one opening on a second side of the metallic plate, the diode holder and the spacer forming a monolithic component. The solenoid of claim 6 wherein the stop member defines a perimeter wall extending between the first side and the second side of the metallic plate, wherein the monolithic component includes a bending tab that projects outward from the perimeter wall, and wherein the first lead bends around the bending tab. The solenoid of claim 6 wherein the second spool includes an end flange with at least one opening providing a passage from a first side to a second side of the end flange, wherein the diode holder extends through the opening in the end flange. The solenoid of claim 8 wherein the opening in the end flange is provided by a recess in a perimeter of the end flange. 10. The solenoid of claim 1 wherein the cylindrical body of the diode defines an axis that is parallel to an axis defined by the at least one coil. 11. A solenoid (20) for a for a motor vehicle starter, the solenoid comprising: a solenoid housing (23): at least one spool (82) arranged in the housing, the at least one spool including a first end flange (94) and a second end flange (96); at least one coil (42) retained on the at least one spool and defining a winding axis; at least one diode holder (110) arranged in the housing between the first end flange and the second end flange of the spool, the at least one diode holder including a body providing at least one diode cavity (120); and at least one diode (140) retained in the at least one diode cavity and electrically connected to the at least one coil. 12. The solenoid of claim 11 wherein the at least one diode includes a cylindrical body and two leads, the cylindrical body defining a diode axis that is substantially parallel to an axis defined by the at least one coil. 13. The solenoid of claim 11 wherein the at least one coil and the at least one spool includes a first coil wound on a first spool and a second coil wound on a second spool, the second spool including the first end flange and the second end flange, and wherein the at least one diode and at least one diode holder includes a first diode retained in a first diode holder between the first end flange and the second end flange and a second diode retained in a second diode holder between the first end flange and the second end flange. 14. A motor vehicle starter comprising: an electric motor (14) retained within a motor housing (15); a solenoid housing (23) adjacent to the motor housing; at least one spool (82) arranged in the solenoid housing (23), the at least one spool including a first end flange (94) and a second end flange (96); at least one coil (42) retained on the at least one spool; at least one diode holder (110) arranged in the solenoid housing between the first end flange and the second end flange of the spool; and at least one diode (140) retained in the at least one diode holder, the at least one diode electrically connected to the at least one coil. 15. The motor vehicle starter of claim 14 wherein the at least one diode holder includes at least one diode cavity with the at least one diode retained in the at least one diode cavity, wherein the at least one diode includes a cylindrical body, a first lead, and a second lead, and wherein the diode holder further includes a bend tab with the first lead bent around the bend tab.
